---
title: "Scripture Readings for Schools and Families. With Comments. The Kings and the Prophets."
---

## Scripture Readings for Schools and Families. With Comments. The Kings and the Prophets.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1874
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology
**Format:** Selection with comments

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Co

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
